body: I've signed Marcus up for First Communion prep starting in September. It's every Sunday at 10. This matters to my family and to me and I'm not negotiating it.

You signed him up without even telling me. He's 8. He can't consent to religion. You're indoctrinating our kid because you can't deal with the fact that I don't believe in any of this. Sunday at 10 is my time with him half the month — you don't get to commandeer that.

Oh that's rich. You call it indoctrination, I call it giving him roots. You've been dragging him to your atheist book club since he was 6 — what's that? His grandparents on my side are devastated he hasn't been baptized. You've already stolen that from this family.

A book club is not a cult, Sandra. And you don't get to guilt me with your parents. You went behind my back AGAIN. Just like the baptism conversation last year that you 'forgot' to finish. You are not capable of co-parenting. You just want to control everything.

I went 'behind your back' because every time I bring up church you shut down and stonewall me for a week. What am I supposed to do — wait forever? You checked out of this family long before the divorce, you were just the last one to figure it out.
Do not bring the marriage into this. We are not doing that. I checked out? You are unbelievable. Keep Marcus out of your religious guilt trip. I'll be talking to my attorney about this.

Great, lawyer up again. That's your solution to everything. While you're at it, explain to your attorney why you haven't paid the last two months of his activity fees. I'm done discussing this with you.
Don't change the subject. Activity fees are separate and you know it. Pull him from the class or we go back to court. I'm done too.
